# Image Pack — PocketRelay (s-software-v01)

Synthetic images for IKAM multimodal benchmarks.

## Folders
- `logos/` — logo explorations
- `people/` — synthetic headshots
- `product-ui/` — synthetic UI screenshots
- `diagrams/` — KPI/pricing/incident diagrams
- `social/` — tiny SaaS launch/hiring templates

## Metadata
- `prompts.jsonl` (JSON per line)

Required keys: id, out_path, kind, prompt, negative_prompt, model, checkpoint, sampler, steps, guidance, width, height, seed, created_at
Optional: style_tags, notes, source_case_id

## Style
- Vibe: minimal micro-SaaS.
- Palette: indigo + mint + off-white.

## Safety
- No real brands.
- No real personal data in UI.
